## Added
- **Minecraft 1.21.4 support — Fabric and NeoForge.** Enhanced Movement is now available for 1.21.4, with full gameplay and performance parity. Everything is here: double jump with smart fall-damage protection, directional dash (double-tap WASD or a dedicated keybind), in-air dash, ledge grab, and the Sandevistan-style dash afterimages — including the stable per-ghost render state and dithered noise-texture trail, and shader-pack-compatible emissive rendering.

## Notes
- Requires **Java 21**. The Fabric build needs Fabric API (Mod Menu optional for the in-game config screen); the NeoForge build needs no extra dependencies.
- Gameplay and configuration are identical to the other Minecraft builds of the same version — only the Minecraft target differs. Existing `config/enhancedmovement.json` settings carry over.
